description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: tests and docs. The tests job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.10, 3.9, 3.8, and 3.7. It checks out the repository, sets up Python, caches pip, installs tox, and runs tox -e py. The docs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.10, caches pip, installs tox, and runs tox -e docs.
